privileged_info_summary: Task creates a SysML Block Definition Diagram of the real Mars Perseverance Rover with verified specifications: MMRTG power system (45 kg, 110 W), 6-wheel aluminum mobility system with rocker-bogie suspension (52.5 cm diameter wheels), science instruments (SuperCam on mast head, MOXIE), and robotic arm (45 kg turret holding SHERLOC and PIXL). All component names, masses, quantities, and locations match official NASA documentation. However, metadata claims minimum 8 composition edges required, while verifier code only enforces >= 3 composition edges for passing (score >= 65 AND comp_edges >= 3).
